subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast arisen with thy whole being to serve the Covenant! A letter hath come from that same person, nurtured in pride and arrogance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من قام بکلیته علی خدمه المیثاق مکتوب مرسول از شخص معهود مربای کبر و غرور
subcodes.subjects: @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation, @pride; vanity; laying claim to inner knowledge, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @priestcraft
